members.name: AddSpacer
members.summary: Adds a [Control] node to the box as a spacer. If [param begin] is [code]true[/code], it will insert the [Control] node in front of all other children.

members.name: Alignment
members.summary: The alignment of the container's children (must be one of [constant ALIGNMENT_BEGIN], [constant ALIGNMENT_CENTER], or [constant ALIGNMENT_END]).

members.name: Vertical
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [BoxContainer] will arrange its children vertically, rather than horizontally. Can't be changed when using [HBoxContainer] and [VBoxContainer].

values.name: ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
values.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the beginning of the container, i.e. top if orientation is vertical, left if orientation is horizontal (right for RTL layout).

values.name: ALIGNMENT_CENTER
values.summary: The child controls will be centered in the container.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_END
values.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the end of the container, i.e. bottom if orientation is vertical, right if orientation is horizontal (left for RTL layout).

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
constants.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the beginning of the container, i.e. top if orientation is vertical, left if orientation is horizontal (right for RTL layout).

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_CENTER
constants.summary: The child controls will be centered in the container.

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_END
constants.summary: The child controls will be arranged at the end of the container, i.e. bottom if orientation is vertical, right if orientation is horizontal (left for RTL layout).
